name: Ardena Group
description: Ardena specializes in the development and manufacturing of nanomedicines, offering expert guidance through the drug development process. Their integrated services and facilities are designed to support early-phase development, ensuring a streamlined pathway for nanomedicine candidates to reach the clinic efficiently.

name: NanoVation Therapeutics
description: NanoVation Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on developing advanced lipid nanoparticle (LNP) technologies for the effective delivery of genetic medicines. Their innovative long-circulating LNP (lcLNP™) platform enhances the targeted delivery of nucleic acids to various tissues, making significant strides in the field of gene therapies.

name: Nanolife
description: NanOlife is a pioneer in the field of nanomedicine, utilizing Green Nanotechnology to create innovative products for oncology, ophthalmology, antibiotics, and cosmeceuticals. Their approach is rooted in over three decades of research by Professor Kattesh Katti, supported by significant investment from the National Cancer Institute.

name: NANO IMS | Insurance Management System
description: NANO Health is focused on modernizing healthcare infrastructure through advanced systems and digital solutions. Their commitment to research and innovation aligns with the principles of nanomedicine, aiming to enhance patient outcomes and empower healthcare providers.

name: NanoMedical Systems
description: NanoMedical Systems is at the forefront of nanomedicine, developing innovative drug-delivery devices through its nStrada™ nanofluidics platform, which ensures sustained release of therapies. This platform employs advanced semiconductor techniques and precise nanochannels to control drug delivery without the need for power or moving parts.

name: Nanomi
description: Nanomi specializes in the development of microspheres and nanoparticles for long-acting release medicines, utilizing its innovative Microsieve technology. This approach enhances drug development potential, particularly in creating complex injectables that address unmet medical needs.

name: Nanox Vision
description: Nanox is dedicated to enhancing preventive healthcare through its innovative medical imaging technologies, which incorporate advanced AI for improved diagnostics. Their ecosystem, including Nanox.ARC and Nanox.AI, focuses on early detection of chronic diseases, ultimately aiming to elevate patient care and health outcomes worldwide.

name: NanomediGene
description: NanomediGene is a biotechnology research and development company that focuses on targeted drug delivery systems using advancements in nanotechnology. Their innovative biopharmaceutical solutions aim to enhance therapeutic efficacy, particularly for challenging diseases like those affecting the kidney, heart, and lungs.

name: NanOlife
description: NanOlife has pioneered the field of nanomedicine by acquiring a patented platform that utilizes Green Nanotechnology, resulting in nano-infused therapeutic products that offer enhanced effectiveness and safety compared to traditional medicines.

name: NanoMed
description: The company specializes in healthcare solutions and emphasizes medical devices and innovations, which may include advancements in nanomedicine.
